generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that while we're debating civil defense budgets, cybercriminals are already exploiting our emergency alert systems? Our preparedness isn't just about stockpiles - it's about securing the systems that keep us informed. #CivilDefense #NationalSecurity
